given: a stock row in the home table has NULL batch_number or NULL serial_number
when: the home stock table is rendered
architectural_notes: E2E: a null-tolerant presentation rule on the home stock table. Rendering 'not tracked' for a NULL batch_number/serial_number is a display concern owned by the boundary + template, not the domain; the model stores NULL and the template substitutes the literal. Same boundary -> service -> repository -> models read path as AC1; no conditional business logic leaks into the service or model.

independence.rationale: AC1 tests column presence with populated data; AC2 tests the observable rendering behavior when data is NULL, a distinct outcome achieved by adding a conditional display rule
